pi_items.source: Task description requires creation of channel with this exact name
setup_task.sh lines 15-17: directory created and populated with 3 HL7 fragment files
setup_task.sh line 16: directory created for channel output
setup_task.sh: 3 HL7 fragments, each with exactly 1 OBX segment (Cholesterol, HDL, LDL)
setup_task.sh lines 24, 32, 40: OBR-2 field in all 3 fragments contains 'ORD123'

privileged_info_summary: This task involves aggregating fragmented HL7 laboratory results for a single patient order. The order ID is ORD123, containing lipid panel test results (Cholesterol, HDL, LDL). The patient is identified as DOE^JOHN (patient ID: PAT12345^^^MRN, DOB: 19800101, Male). Test results show: Cholesterol 200 mg/dL (reference 100-200), HDL Cholesterol 50 mg/dL (reference >40), LDL Cholesterol 130 mg/dL (reference <100). All input data consists of 3 synthetic HL7 v2.5 message fragments with sequence numbers 1/3, 2/3, 3/3 that must be aggregated into a single message before delivery to the output directory.
